title: Channel Capability Baseline
objective: Prove the target OpenClaw runtime exposes the shared message-channel capability contract expected by Kova before adapter-specific conformance runs.

phases.title: Provision Runtime Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment with the selected target runtime so Kova can probe the release-shaped package artifact.

phases.title: OpenClaw Channel Capability Baseline
phases.intent: Import the selected OpenClaw runtime's packaged channel-message contract helpers and emit one capability proof row per OpenClaw baseline capability.
evidence: OpenClaw runtime channel contract helper results
